channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Georgia appeals court cancels arguments in Trump's bid to disqualify Fani Willis
item.description: A Georgia appeals court canceled next month’s oral arguments in President-elect Trump’s bid to disqualify Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis (D) from criminally prosecuting him. Monday's one-sentence order from the Georgia Court of Appeals canceling the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics: Trump border czar pick fires back at House Dem critic
item.description: Get the latest updates on the Trump transition, the incoming Congress, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Court-martialed military veteran sentenced to over 4 years in prison for Capitol riot attack
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A former U.S. Army soldier who was court-martialed for fatally shooting a handcuffed civilian in Iraq two decades ago was sentenced on Monday to more than four years in prison for his role in the attack on the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. Edward Richmond Jr.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pentagon fails 7th audit in a row but says progress made
item.description: The nation's largest government agency is unable to fully account for its more than $824 billion budget.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, NewsNation

item.title: Ron Johnson says his 'bias would be to vote' for Trump's picks
item.description: Sen. Ron Johnson, R-Wis., said he doesn't "particularly like being the human resource department of administration.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: What’s ahead for abortion access in Minnesota under a Trump administration
item.description: While detailed plans have yet to emerge, health and legal experts, practitioners and advocates in Minnesota are closely monitoring the new administration for hints about what federal changes to abortion could mean for the state.
item.dc:creator: Erica Zurek, MPR News

item.title: The last actions the Biden administration will take before Trump takes over the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Biden administration officials are working against the clock doling out billions in grants and taking other steps to try to preserve at least some of the outgoing president’s legacy before President-elect Donald Trump takes office in January.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, MATTHEW DALY and COLLIN BINKLEY Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Senate Republicans concerned with Gaetz nomination ask to access House ethics probe
item.description: Senators are calling for access to a House Ethics Committee probe into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, R-Fla., following his nomination to be the next Attorney General under president-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh, Lexie Schapitl, and Elena Moore, MPR News

item.title: What can Florida expect from the next legislative session
item.description: Florida legislature meets for an organization session 14 days after the general election to swear in new members and speak on what the year ahead could look like at the capitol.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump tapping Noem to lead Homeland Security: Reports
item.description: Noem was first floated as a possible running mate for Trump, but her consideration fizzled after the release of her biography, in which she described killing a dog that was “untrainable.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Mike Johnson: Republicans 'ready to deliver' on Trump's agenda
item.description: Congress returns to a changed Washington as President-elect Donald Trump’s hard-right agenda is quickly taking shape, buoyed by eager Republican allies eyeing a full sweep of power on Capitol Hill while Democrats are sorting out what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court will not hear challenge to Jan. 6 ‘parading’ charge
item.description: The Supreme Court said Tuesday it will not consider a challenge to a misdemeanor charge used against scores of Jan. 6, 2021, rioters for unlawfully "parading” in the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Mark Meadows's push to move Georgia election case to federal court
item.description: The Supreme Court refused Tuesday to hear former Trump White House chief of staff Mark Meadows’s appeal seeking to move to federal court his Georgia criminal charges related to efforts to overturn the 2020 election.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Americans stock up on emergency birth control, abortion pills ahead of second Trump presidency
item.description: Medication abortion providers reported a surge in requests for and purchases of the drugs in the hours after President-elect Trump was reelected.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, WFLA, NBC
